_doc: Cross-platform canonical for the DNS probe server list (audit C7 / D3c-07). The same upstream DNS server IPs are hardcoded in Kotlin (helper/DnsTester.kt DNS_SERVERS) and Swift (ios/core/DnsTester.swift). src/utils/dns-servers-sync.test.ts reads both sources and asserts their IP set matches this file, so a one-sided edit fails make test. No JS copy (JS resolves via expo/fetch).
